name: ECOLAB INC.
summary: Ecolab Inc. is a global leader in water, hygiene, and infection prevention solutions serving customers in more than 170 countries and 40 industries. The company provides water treatment chemicals, cleaning and sanitizing products, pest elimination services, and life sciences solutions. Key offerings include 3D TRASAR technologies, antimicrobial products, food safety equipment, and digital monitoring systems. Ecolab reported $16 billion in annual sales and serves food, healthcare, hospitality, data centers, microelectronics, and industrial markets.

products.name: 3D TRASAR
products.description: Combines chemistry, remote services, and monitoring and control for water treatment applications.

products.name: Cooling Water Treatment Programs
products.description: Controls corrosion, scale, and microbial fouling in open recirculating, once-through, and closed cooling systems.

products.name: Clean-in-Place Process Control Systems
products.description: Designed and installed for food and beverage processing facility cleaning operations.

products.name: Digital Monitoring and Chemical Dispensing Systems
products.description: Used by customers to efficiently and safely dispense cleaners and sanitizers.

products.name: Antimicrobial Products
products.description: Used in direct contact with meat, poultry, seafood, and produce to reduce microbial contamination during processing.

products.name: Infection Prevention Solutions
products.description: Includes hand hygiene, hard surface disinfection, digital monitoring systems, and instrument cleaning for healthcare institutions.

products.name: Pest Elimination Services
products.description: Pest elimination solutions provided as a reportable segment to various industries.

products.name: Life Sciences Solutions
products.description: Solutions provided under the Global Life Sciences reportable segment.

products.name: Specialty Petroleum Programs
products.description: Refining process applications, fuels and feedstocks additives for petroleum and fuels industry.

products.name: Pulp and Paper Water Treatment Programs
products.description: Comprehensive programs used in all principal steps of the papermaking process across all paper grades.
